parameters.name: sep
parameters.description: Lookup transactions belonging to this SEP.

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description:
Specifies field that transactions will be ordered by. Note, that secondary sort is transaction id in ascending value.
I.e. when timestamps for 2 or more transactions is identical, they will be sorted by id.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description:
Specifies order. Note, that when the field is null, all transactions with null value will be last, regardless of soring order (NULLS LAST).
For example, transfer time may not be specified for some transactions, resulting into `transfer_received_at` being null. If so, transactions with non-null values will be sorted and returned first, followed by all transactions with null timestamps.

parameters.name: statuses

items.description: Possible status values for all transactions
items.title: StatusSEPAll

parameters.description: Filters transactions for specified array of statuses. If not provided, filtering is disabled (default behavior)

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Size of a single search page. Must be positive.

parameters.name: page_number
parameters.description: Page number to use for continuous search. Page count beings at 0.
